calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Grievance Committee Decision
Off Calendar Apr-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PETITIONER NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DISTRICT COUNCIL OF LABORERS' Petition To Confirm Grievance Committee Decision is Granted. No opposition filed. (The Court will review the order that was sent by email.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
